mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ai_review_report WHERE submission_id = #{submissionId} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT r.* FROM ai_review_report r INNER JOIN submission s ON r.submission_id = s.id INNER JOIN work w ON s.work_id = w.id WHERE w.competition_track_id = #{competitionTrackId}
SELECT r.* FROM ai_review_report r INNER JOIN submission s ON r.submission_id = s.id INNER JOIN work w ON s.work_id = w.id WHERE w.competition_id = #{competitionId}
